TravelRecord.title: TravelRecord
TravelRecord.description: A record of a travel experience.

id.description: The unique identifier of the record.

title.description: The title of the travel record.

content.description: The main content/description of the travel.

rating.description: The rating given to the travel experience (e.g., 1-5).

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp of when the record was created.

authorUid.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user who created the record.
